Please note: If the 62 Day Breach Date is blank, the patient is on a 31 Day Pathway. Please ensure that the Decision To Treat Date is within 31 days of the Treatment Date.

Diagnosis: Sigmoid adenocarcinoma
ICD10 Code: C18.6
Differentiation: Moderately differentiated

Symptoms include altered bowel habit, mucous discharge, reduced appetite, and intermittent bloating for 5 weeks. Patient also reports night sweats. Relevant history includes chronic kidney disease stage 3.


CT TAP on 06/09/2024: sigmoid colon thickening with no enlarged mesenteric nodes; no distant metastases.
